name: Baked Sandwich Roll
recipeInstructions:
1. On a lightly floured surface, roll the thawed dough into a rectangle measuring approximately 15x20 inches.
2. Spread spicy mustard evenly over the entire surface of the rolled dough.
3. Lay slices of turkey pastrami over the mustard, followed by a layer of cheese and another layer of turkey.
4. Sprinkle Italian dressing sporadically over the turkey slices.
5. Roll up the rectangle into a jelly roll style, pinching the edges to seal.
6. Brush the top surface with beaten egg white.
7. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 20 to 30 minutes, or until golden brown. If the top browns too quickly, cover with aluminum foil.
8. Cool slightly before slicing into 2-inch slices.
